title: Cherry-pick PR #677: Fix audio playback on Linux
description:
On Linux, Tauri's convertFileSrc (asset://) protocol doesn't work reliably for audio playback. This PR works around the issue by starting a local HTTP sound server (using axum) on Linux only, and serving sound files from 127.0.0.1 on a random port.

On macOS and Windows, the existing convertFileSrc/resolveResource approach is preserved unchanged.

Changes

  - src-tauri/src/sound.rs (new): Adds a local axum HTTP server (Linux-only, gated with #[cfg(target_os = "linux")]) that serves sound
notes: Upstream files: src-tauri/src/main.rs, src-tauri/src/sound.rs, src/bindings/generated.ts, src/utils/sound.ts

in_scope: Port upstream PR #677 changes to our fork
Resolve any merge conflicts with our modifications
Verify the fix works in our build
out_of_scope: Unrelated changes to the same files

requirements: The bug/feature from PR #677 works correctly

acceptance_gates: PR #677 behavior verified in running app

manual: Verify PR #677 fix in running app

iteration_log.result: sound.rs and all Linux audio changes already present
